name: PER_CHK_CONTENT_DEFNS_VL
query: SELECT B.CHK_CONTENT_DEFN_ID, B.CONTENT_DEFN_CODE, B.CONTENT_TYPE, B.CONTENT_SUBTYPE, T.TITLE, T.DESCRIPTION, T.CONTENT_DETAILS, B.CONTENT_CATEGORY, B.CONTENT_URL, B.IMAGE_URL, B.HTML_CONTENT, B.EVENT_DATE, B.EVENT_TIME, B.EVENT_LOCATION, B.STATUS, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.EMBEDDED_CONTENT, B.EVENT_OFFSET, B.EMBEDDED_CONTENT_TYPE FROM PER_CHK_CONTENT_DEFNS_B B, PER_CHK_CONTENT_DEFNS_TL T WHERE B.CHK_CONTENT_DEFN_ID = T.CHK_CONTENT_DEFN_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
